paperTitle: Universal Pose Pretraining for Generalizable Vision-Language-Action Policies
organization: Tencent Robotics X / HKUST / Fudan University

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 96.5 · libero object 98 · libero goal 97.1 · libero 10 92.4 | Table III | Notes: Standard 4-suite LIBERO. PaliGemma backbone with pose-pretrained VLM. model_paper inferred from reported_paper (extract did not set it)

benchmarks.label: RoboTwin 2.0
benchmarks.detail: Suites: easy 79.91 · hard 79.1 | Table II | Notes: Protocol B: multi-task, 50 clean + 500 DR demos/task. 50 tasks. RGB-only evaluation (depth/raymap masked). Avg 79.5% reported in abstract.
